summary: FREMAX Catalog App - Iteration 5: Tested new features including cascading dropdowns (Make→Vehicle→Model), admin login with adminfleu/admin123, Application model changes (make/vehicle/model/start_year/end_year/vehicle_type), and bulk import template updates. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests successful.

minor.issue: Both old (admin/admin123) and new (adminfleu/admin123) credentials work - suggests both users exist in DB. Not a breaking issue but may want to remove old admin.

passed_tests: Homepage loads with three search tabs: CODE/REFERENCE, APPLICATION, MEASUREMENTS - PASSED
APPLICATION tab shows cascading dropdowns: Make, Vehicle, Model, Year - PASSED
Vehicle dropdown disabled until Make selected - PASSED
Model dropdown disabled until Vehicle selected - PASSED
Admin login with adminfleu/admin123 at /#/admin/login - PASSED
Admin dashboard loads with product management - PASSED
Admin product detail Applications tab shows new fields: Make, Vehicle, Model, Start Year, End Year, Vehicle Type - PASSED
POST /api/admin/login with adminfleu/admin123 returns access_token - PASSED
POST /api/admin/change-password with wrong current password returns 400 - PASSED
POST /api/admin/change-password with short password (<6 chars) returns 400 - PASSED
POST /api/search with make, vehicle, model, year, vehicle_type params - PASSED
Product creation with new application fields (make, vehicle, model, start_year, end_year, vehicle_type) - PASSED
Bulk import page shows updated CSV template: part_number,make,vehicle,model,start_year,end_year,vehicle_type - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Created test products during testing (BD-VW-001, TEST_ITER5_* products) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Admin credentials are adminfleu/admin123. The /api/admin/setup endpoint is removed and returns 404. Application model changed from brand/model/year_from/year_to to make/vehicle/model/start_year/end_year/vehicle_type. Cascading dropdowns work correctly with Make→Vehicle→Model flow. HashRouter is used for SPA routing with # URLs.
